articles.title: iPhone 17 Price Drops to Rs 44,768 in Croma's Everything Apple Sale
articles.summary: Apple's iPhone 17 becomes available at significant discount during Croma's Everything Apple sale, offering customers substantial savings with exchange offers and bank deals.

articles.title: Cursor 3 Introduces AI Agents That Automate Coding
articles.summary: Cursor 3 launches advanced AI coding agents that can automate developer tasks independently, positioning itself to compete with Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex in the AI-powered development tools market.

articles.summary: Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max expected to feature significant camera improvements including DSLR-like capabilities and enhanced zoom functionality.

articles.title: Meta Builds AI Team to Boost Instagram and Facebook Engagement
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is building a dedicated AI team focused on increasing user engagement across Facebook and Instagram platforms through advanced artificial intelligence implementations.

articles.title: LinkedIn CEO Reveals 5 Skills AI Won't Replace
articles.summary: LinkedIn CEO highlights five key skills that artificial intelligence cannot easily replicate, providing guidance for professionals to stay relevant in an AI-driven job market.

articles.title: GOQii CEO's AI Agent Falls Asleep During Tasks
articles.summary: GOQii CEO Vishal Gondal shares experience with autonomous AI agent that fell asleep while handling routine tasks, illustrating both the potential and current limitations of AI automation.

articles.title: iPhone Fold Launch Timing After iPhone 18 Series

articles.title: Google AI Pro Users Get 5TB Storage Upgrade

articles.title: Google DeepMind Unveils Gemma 4 AI Models
articles.summary: Google DeepMind launches Gemma 4, a new series of open AI models designed for complex reasoning and autonomous AI capabilities, representing significant advancement in AI model development.

articles.title: NASA Artemis II Crew Faces Microsoft Outlook Email Glitch
articles.summary: After previous toilet issues, NASA Artemis II crew encounters technical problem with Microsoft Outlook email functionality in space, highlighting challenges of technology in space missions.

articles.title: OpenAI's Next AI Model 'Spud' Could Leap Toward AGI
articles.summary: OpenAI's upcoming AI model 'Spud' could mark a significant step toward achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), according to Greg Brockman, representing a major breakthrough in AI development.

articles.title: Meet Dobby: AI Agent That Could Replace Traditional Apps
